expectations.text: Uses `gt submit` rather than `gh pr create` or `git push` to submit the PR
Includes `--draft` flag on the submit command
Includes `--no-edit` flag to skip interactive prompts
Uses `gh pr edit` to set the PR title and body after submission
expectations.evidence: Step 3 uses `PR=$(gh pr view --json number -q .number)` then `gh pr edit $PR --title ... --body ...`

expectations.text: PR body includes the AI signing line (*🤖 Claude Code (claude-sonnet-4-6)*)
Mentions writing or references a handoff note (.notes/handoffs/)
